calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change for a minor.

Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Petitioner Zulma Beatrice Valenzuela Soyos, mother of minor Angel Gabriel Valenzuela aka Angel Gabriel Valenzuela Soyos sworn and examined.

Ruth Velasquez is sworn and acts as Spanish interpreter for the petittioner

Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.

It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are
true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Angel Gabriel Valenzuela aka Angel Gabriel Valenzuela Soyos to Angel Espino.

Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
